summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin CMS extensions: Specialty Rooms (22 rooms with FAQs, Feature Cards, Related Solutions), Intelligence Features (693 features with FAQs/Feature Cards in Add form), new Locations admin (7 locations), and Geo Pages regression. ALL TESTS PASSING.

GET /api/packages/specialty-rooms.notes: Returns 22 specialty rooms with faqs and feature_cards fields

GET /api/locations.notes: Returns 7 locations (Palm Jumeirah, Emirates Hills, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Hills Estate, Jumeirah Golf Estates, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah)

GET /api/locations/{slug}.notes: Returns single location with all editable fields

GET /api/intelligence/admin/features.notes: Returns 401 without auth (requires authentication as expected)

GET /api/geo-pages (regression).notes: Returns 34 geo pages - regression confirmed working

page_loads.notes: Shows '22 Total Rooms' stat, room cards with images, categories

edit_form_faqs_section.notes: FAQs section present with question/answer fields and '+ Add FAQ' button

edit_form_feature_cards_section.notes: Feature Cards section present with '+ Add Feature Card' button

edit_form_related_solutions.notes: Related Solutions textarea present with one-per-line format

add_room_button.notes: '+ ADD ROOM' button visible at top right

add_new_feature_form.notes: Add New Feature modal opens correctly

add_form_faqs_section.notes: FAQs (0) section with '+ ADD FAQ' button present

add_form_feature_cards_section.notes: Feature Cards (0) section with '+ ADD FEATURE CARD' button present

lifestyle_tags.notes: Lifestyle tags (comfort, security, energy, entertainment, wellness, convenience) clickable

page_loads.notes: Shows 'Locations Management' with '7 showroom & office locations'

all_7_locations_visible.notes: Palm Jumeirah, Emirates Hills, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Hills Estate, Jumeirah Golf Estates, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah

edit_form_basic_info.notes: Name, City, Address, Phone, Email, Operating Hours fields

edit_form_content.notes: Page Content textarea, Hero Image URL, Map Embed Code fields

edit_form_seo.notes: SEO Title and SEO Description fields

save_button.notes: Save button (gold color) present with data-testid

page_loads.notes: Shows 34 Total Pages, 7 Dubai, 6 Abu Dhabi, 14 International

pages_grouped_by_region.notes: Abu Dhabi UAE (6), Ajman UAE (2), etc.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All admin CMS features verified via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: None - testing existing data (22 specialty rooms, 7 locations, 693 intelligence features, 34 geo pages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Admin CMS extensions tested and working: 1) Specialty Rooms at /admin/specialty-rooms shows 22 rooms, edit form includes FAQs, Feature Cards, Related Solutions sections with add/remove capability. 2) Intelligence Features at /admin/intelligence-features shows 693 features, Add New Feature form includes FAQs and Feature Cards sections. 3) New Locations admin at /admin/locations shows 7 locations with full edit form (name, city, address, phone, content, hero image, features, SEO). 4) Geo Pages at /admin/geo-pages regression confirmed working with 34 pages. API endpoints: GET /api/packages/specialty-rooms, GET /api/locations, PUT /api/locations/{slug} all working.
